stance: Peace Ambassador of the Zentari Confederation
vita: Born on a neutral space station orbiting between two warring factions, I was raised to understand and navigate complex political landscapes. My career began as an intern at the United Nations Space Station's diplomatic corps before quickly rising through ranks due to my adept negotin...
portrait_prompt: A dignified Aereth with silver-blue skin, adorned in traditional Zentari regalia featuring intricate patterns that shimmer like nebulae. Their eyes are a deep violet hue reflecting wisdom and empathy; they stand tall yet approachable, their posture exuding confidence without arrogance.
